description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: Public transport service arrangements for departures of Hong Kong Sevens
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 香港國際七人欖球賽離場公共運輸服務安排

2025-03-30T17:04:00.CONTENT_EN: All matches of the Hong Kong Sevens held at the Kai Tak Sports Park are scheduled to conclude after 7pm today (March 30). As more spectators are expected to disperse at the same time, the Transport Department (TD) urges those leaving the venue to take the MTR as far as possible. The TD has been steering public transport service arrangements and the overall traffic conditions have mostly been smooth so far: MTR: The service headway of the Tuen Ma Line will be further enhanced to about 3.5 minutes and spare trains will be deployed as needed to expedite the dispersal. The service level of the East Rail Line and the Kwun Tong Line will also be enhanced accordingly. Passengers can travel directly from Kai Tak Station or Sung Wong Toi Station to East Tsim Sha Tsui Station within 15 minutes, and it only takes some 24 minutes to Central Station via interchanging at Hung Hom Station and Admiralty Station; Taxis: In view of an outflux of spectators, the waiting time is anticipated to be longer and your patience is appreciated. The TD has made all-out efforts with the taxi trade to mobilise more taxis for picking up passengers, including disseminating real-time information on passengers queuing to the trade directly. The Kai Tak Sports Park Limited has also mobilised taxis via instant messaging platform; and Special bus routes: The route departing for Central (Causeway Bay and Wan Chai) will be advanced to commence service from 6pm while the remaining special bus routes will operate after the tournaments conclude, subject to the passenger demand and traffic conditions on-site. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (QR code displayed on-site) as well as the latest traffic news through the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2025-03-30T17:04:00.CONTENT_CN: 正在啟德體育園舉行的香港國際七人欖球賽預計今日（三月三十日）晚上七時後完成所有賽事。由於預計較多觀眾同一時間離場，運輸署呼籲離場人士盡量乘搭港鐵。署方一直督導公共運輸服務安排，整體交通至今大致暢順： 港鐵：屯馬綫班次會進一步加密至約3.5分鐘一班車，並會按需要派出空載列車加快疏導；東鐵綫和觀塘綫亦會相應加密班次。從啟德站或宋皇臺站無需轉車，15分鐘內便可到尖東站；經紅磡站和金鐘站轉車往中環站亦只需約24分鐘； 的士：由於離場人士較多，預期輪候時間會較長，請耐心輪候登車。署方已全方位調動的士業界指派更多的士到場接載乘客，向業界直接發放乘客候車的實時資訊；啟德體育園有限公司亦已經即時通訊平台呼籲的士到場；及 特別巴士路線：前往中環（銅鑼灣和灣仔）的路線將提前於下午六時起投入服務，其餘特別巴士路線會在賽事結束後視乎客量及現場交通情況開出。 觀眾請留意現場廣播和「離場易」（現場展示二維碼）的實時資訊，以及經「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台及電視台發放的最新交通消息。

2025-03-30T19:26:00.CONTENT_EN: Spectators of the Hong Kong Sevens held at the Kai Tak Sports Park are gradually dispersing. The Transport Department (TD) today (March 30) said that the overall traffic conditions have mostly been smooth so far: MTR: Spectators are urged to take the MTR to leave the venue as far as possible. The service of the Tuen Ma Line has been further enhanced and spare trains will be deployed as needed. Services of the East Rail Line and the Kwun Tong Line will also be enhanced accordingly; Taxis: The Taxi Pick-up/Drop-off Area have maintained normal services. The waiting time will be longer amid the dispersal peak and your patience is appreciated. The TD has made all-out efforts with the taxi trade to mobilise more taxis for picking up passengers, including disseminating real-time information on passengers queuing to the trade directly. The Kai Tak Sports Park Limited has also mobilised taxis via instant messaging platform; and Special bus routes: A total of 10 special bus routes departing for Central via Causeway Bay and Wan Chai, Siu Sai Wan, Tsim Sha Tsui, Mong Kok, Tseung Kwan O (Hang Hau), Tseung Kwan O (LOHAS Park), Tsing Yi, Sheung Shui, Tuen Mun and Tin Shui Wai are ready and will operate subject to the passenger demand. Spectators are advised to take heed of the real-time information via on-site broadcast and the "Easy Leave" (QR code displayed on-site) as well as the latest traffic news through the "HKeMobility" mobile application, radio and television broadcasts.
2025-03-30T19:26:00.CONTENT_CN: 在啟德體育園舉行的香港國際七人欖球賽觀眾正陸續離場。運輸署今日（三月三十日）表示，整體交通至今大致暢順： 港鐵：署方呼籲離場人士盡量乘搭港鐵。屯馬綫已進一步加密班次，並會按需要派出空載列車；東鐵綫和觀塘綫亦會相應加密班次； 的士：的士上落客區至今運作正常。由於進入離場高峰時段，預計輪候時間會較長，請耐心輪候登車。署方已全方位調動的士業界指派更多的士到場接載乘客，向業界直接發放乘客候車的實時資訊；啟德體育園有限公司亦已經即時通訊平台呼籲的士到場；及 特別巴士路線：前往中環經銅鑼灣和灣仔、小西灣、尖沙咀、旺角、將軍澳（坑口）、將軍澳（日出康城）、青衣、上水、屯門和天水圍共10條特別巴士路線已準備就緒，因應客量開出班次。 觀眾請留意現場廣播和「離場易」（現場展示二維碼）的實時資訊，以及經「香港出行易」流動應用程式、電台及電視台發放的最新交通消息。

description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) Train Service Adjustments
description.INCIDENT_DETAIL_CN: 高速鐵路（香港段）列車服務調整

2025-04-01T08:10:00.CONTENT_EN: High Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) Train Service Adjustments Starting from April 10, 2025, the High-Speed Rail (Hong Kong Section) will introduce the following adjustments: ● from Guangzhounan Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station - Train G6525: will stop at Qingsheng Station and will not stop at Humen Station; departure time from Guangzhounan Station will change to 13:54 ● from Shanwei Station to Hong Kong West Kowloon Station - Train G6531: departure time from Shanwei Station will change to 07:14 ● from Hong Kong West Kowloon Station to Guangzhounan Station - Train G6536: will stop at Qingsheng Station - Train G6588: will stop at Qingsheng Station and will not stop at Humen Station The arrival times for certain stations of the above trains have been slightly adjusted, please (click here) to view the new train schedule. Tickets are available for purchase through the 12306 official website (12306. cn/en/) or mobile app; appointed travel agents (Click here); or at Hong Kong West Kowloon Station.
2025-04-01T08:10:00.CONTENT_CN: 高速鐵路（香港段）列車服務調整 由2025年4月10日起，高速鐵路（香港段）將作出以下調整： ●由廣州南站前往香港西九龍站 -車次G6525:新增停靠慶盛站，不停虎門站；改為13:54於廣州南開出 ●由汕尾站前往香港西九龍站 -車次G6531:改為07:14於汕尾開出 ●由香港西九龍站前往廣州南站 -車次G6536:新增停靠慶盛站 -車次G6588:新增停靠慶盛站，不停虎門站 上述車次個別站點到達時間略有調整，請(按此) 瀏覽新行車時間表。 你可透過12306官方網站(12306.cn)或手機應用程式、指定代理(按此)或前往香港西九龍站購買列車車票。
